{{Infobox character
| name = Mason Zhen
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Mason Zhen]] is an elderly [[Mason]] who lives in a mist-gray house.}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
